free_text: Survey of 17O excited states selectively populated
by five-particle transfer reactions
Self-supporting, natural carbon target with an areal
density of 100 microgram/cm2.
Two dE-E silicon surface barrier
telescopes composed of a 300 micrometer dE detector
and a 5 mm E detector. An experimental resolution of
around 110 keV was obtained.
total uncertainty consisting of
- beam current integration 3%
- repeatability  3%
- angle setting 2%
- counting statistics  <1%
added in quadrature
Compiled by S.H.
Data taken from tables sent by author (BTR)
